Title: COMMENT ON
Description:
The COMMENT ON statement allows adding metadata to catalog entries (tables, columns, etc.).
It follows the PostgreSQL syntax .
Create a comment on a TABLE :
Create a comment on a COLUMN :
Create a comment on a VIEW :
Create a comment on an INDEX :
Create a comment on a SEQUENCE :
Create a comment on a TYPE :
Create a comment on a MACRO :
Create a comment on a MACRO TABLE :
To unset a comment, set it to NULL , e.g.:
Comments can be read by querying the comment column of the respective metadata functions :

Examples:
COMMENT
ON
TABLE
test_table
IS
'very nice table'
;

COMMENT
ON
COLUMN
test_table.test_table_column
IS
'very nice column'
;

COMMENT
ON
VIEW
test_view
IS
'very nice view'
;

COMMENT
ON
INDEX
test_index
IS
'very nice index'
;

COMMENT
ON
SEQUENCE
test_sequence
IS
'very nice sequence'
;

COMMENT
ON
TYPE
test_type
IS
'very nice type'
;

COMMENT
ON
MACRO
test_macro
IS
'very nice macro'
;

COMMENT
ON
MACRO
TABLE
test_table_macro
IS
'very nice table macro'
;

COMMENT
ON
TABLE
test_table
IS
NULL
;
